sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 20:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 20:1
items.html: The ten Sefirot that pass through the screen downward, where Malchut expands into ten Sefirot from and within her are called Guf. This is because they are the primary force in the Partzuf, for there is the primary clothing of the self in the vessels. However, in the ten Sefirot of the Rosh from the screen upwards there is no complete clothing, but only roots for the clothing. (Part 3, Chapter 8, item 6)
